result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Apple Watch Series 11 product page, scrolled to a comparison/features section. No modal or form open; page is readable and interactive.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Apple Watch Series 11”
“Up to 24 hours”
“Up to 38 hours in Low Power Mode”
“Fast charging”
“Compare all Apple Watch models”
Also visible: “Overview”, “Why Apple Watch”, “Tech Specs”, “Buy”.
selected_candidate:
Apple Watch Series 11 battery life: “Up to 24 hours” (with “Up to 38 hours in Low Power Mode”).
constraint_evidence:
1. Navigate to Apple’s website — supported (apple.com URL and Apple Watch Series 11 page visible).
2. Determine the average battery life — supported in part (battery life text visible, but “average” is not explicitly shown).
3. Latest Apple Watch model — supported by context/title (Apple Watch Series 11).
4. Need a numeric battery-life answer — supported (visible “Up to 24 hours”).
5. Product detail page qualifier — supported (this is a product page; no price/rating/date visible in this screenshot).
action_target:
Send the user the extracted battery-life answer or exit if done: “[EXIT]”.
success_signals:
Battery life value is visible and attributable to the latest model.
Page title confirms Apple Watch Series 11.
No conflicting battery-life value shown for this model in the visible area.
failure_signals:
“Average” battery life is not explicitly labeled; only “Up to” battery life is shown.
Could be missing a more precise spec elsewhere on the page.
No comparison context indicating w

events.message: {"run_id":"2b5043e60689641f15f2ae8de566f023fdeece8548a5f2f2a78071c2d167f080","evidence":[{"claim":"The run reached the Apple Watch Series 11 product page and navigated through several scrolls without any visible error banner or modal interruption.","source":"trajectory_digest","run_id":"2b5043e60689641f15f2ae8de566f023fdeece8548a5f2f2a78071c2d167f080","step_index":3},{"claim":"The final inspected screenshot shows the relevant battery-life text for Apple Watch Series 11: “Up to 24 hours” and “Up to 38 hours in Low Power Mode”.","source":"step_detail_high","run_id":"2b5043e60689641f15f2ae8de566f023fdeece8548a5f2f2a78071c2d167f080","step_index":20},{"claim":"The page context confirms the latest model is Apple Watch Series 11, and the page is readable and interactive with no modal open.","source":"step_detail_high","run_id":"2b5043e60689641f15f2ae8de566f080","step_index":20},{"claim":"The task asked for the average battery life, but the visible page text provides only an “Up to” battery-life specification rather than an explicitly labeled average.","source":"step_detail_high","run_id":"2b5043e60689641f15f2ae8de566f023fdeece8548a5f2f2a78071c2d167f080","step_index":20}],"retrieved_context_ids":[],"failure_step":null,"failure_type":null,"expected_behavior":"Extract and report the battery-life information for the latest Apple Watch model from Apple's site.","actual_behavior":"The agent navigated to the Apple Watch Series 11 page and exited after reaching a section showing battery-life specs, but it did not explicitly resolve the user's requested 'average battery life' phrasing.","regression_rule":"When the task asks for a specific spec phrased as an average or exact value, do not substitute a nearby marketing spec unless the page explicitly supports the requested measure; extract the closest clearly stated battery-life figure and note the limitation if the page only provides 'Up to' values.","suggested_followups":[{"label":"Inspect step 20 in detail","message":"Show the final screenshot and the battery-life text that was visible on the Apple Watch Series 11 page."},{"label":"Compare with a successful run","message":"Find a validated successful run for a similar Apple Watch battery-life lookup task."}]}

evidence.claim: The run reached the Apple Watch Series 11 product page and navigated through several scrolls without any visible error banner or modal interruption.
The final inspected screenshot shows the relevant battery-life text for Apple Watch Series 11: “Up to 24 hours” and “Up to 38 hours in Low Power Mode”.
The page context confirms the latest model is Apple Watch Series 11, and the page is readable and interactive with no modal open.
The task asked for the average battery life, but the visible page text provides only an “Up to” battery-life specification rather than an explicitly labeled average.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 20 in detail
suggested_followups.message: Show the final screenshot and the battery-life text that was visible on the Apple Watch Series 11 page.

suggested_followups.message: Find a validated successful run for a similar Apple Watch battery-life lookup task.
